title: clerodendrum margaritense
intro: Clerodendrum margaritense, also known as the Pearl Vine or Star Jasmine, is a flowering evergreen vine native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. Clerodendrum margaritense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
